title: thelypteris cataractorum
intro: Thelypteris cataractorum, also known as Cataract Fern, is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris cataractorum include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
